children.heading: .—Requirements for Approval
children.label: a .—Requirements for Approval
children.text: Except as provided in section 15304(c)(3), decisions by the Commission shall require the affirmative vote of the Federal Cochairperson and a majority of the State members or alternate State members, including designees (exclusive of members representing States delinquent under section 15304(c)(3)(C)).

children.heading: .—Consultation
children.label: b .—Consultation
children.text: In matters coming before the Commission, the Federal Cochairperson shall, to the extent practicable, consult with the Federal departments and agencies having an interest in the subject matter.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), a Commission shall determine what constitutes a quorum for meetings of the Commission.

children.label: A
children.text: the Federal Cochairperson or the alternate Federal Cochairperson; and

children.label: B
children.text: a majority of State members or alternate State members, including designees (exclusive of members representing States delinquent under section 15304(c)(3)(C)).

children.heading: .—Projects and Grant Proposals
children.label: d .—Projects and Grant Proposals
children.text: The approval of project and grant proposals shall be a responsibility of each Commission and shall be carried out in accordance with section 15503.
